name: Track Pennylane invoice payment status with Slack notifications

parameters.content:
# Track Pennylane invoice payment status with Slack notifications

## Who is this for

Teams using Pennylane who want automatic alerts when invoices are paid or become overdue, without checking Pennylane manually.

## What it does

This workflow runs every 15 minutes, fetches all customer invoices from Pennylane, and classifies them as paid, overdue, or upcoming. If any invoices have been paid or are overdue, it sends a summary notification to Slack. If everything is normal, the workflow ends silently.

## How to set up

1. Import this workflow into n8n
2. Create a Header Auth credential: name `Authorization`, value `Bearer <YOUR_PENNYLANE_TOKEN>`
3. Select your Slack channel in the SL Send Notification node
4. Adjust the schedule interval in the Schedule Trigger node if needed

## Requirements

- Pennylane account with API access (Essentiel plan or higher)
- Pennylane API token with scope: customer_invoices:all
- (Optional) Slack workspace

Note: Pennylane API does not support filtering by status or paid fields. All classification is done client-side in a Code node.

Part of a 3-workflow billing suite: https://github.com/Gauthier-Huguenin/n8n-pennylane-auto-invoicing

---

### Flow

`Schedule Trigger`
  → `PL Fetch Invoices`
  → `Code Filter Status Changes`
  → `IF Has Updates`
    → ✅ `Code Build Payment Notification` → `SL Send Notification`
    → ❌ `Set Done`

---

### Node refs for $()

- Schedule Trigger
- PL Fetch Invoices
- Code Filter Status Changes
- IF Has Updates
- Code Build Payment Notification
- SL Send Notification
- Set Done

## 1. Trigger

Runs every 15 minutes.
Polls Pennylane for all customer invoices.

Adjust the schedule interval in the
Schedule Trigger node to fit your needs.

## 2. Fetch invoices

Retrieves all customer invoices from Pennylane.

Endpoint: GET /customer_invoices

Note: the Pennylane API does not support
filtering by status or paid fields.
All filtering is done in the next Code node.

## 3. Classify & filter

Classifies each invoice into 3 categories:
- paid: invoice has been settled
- overdue: past deadline and still unpaid
- upcoming: not yet due

Only triggers a notification if there are
paid or overdue invoices (has_updates = true).

If all invoices are upcoming, the workflow
ends silently via Set Done.

## 4. Notify

Builds a summary message with:
- List of newly paid invoices
- List of overdue invoices
- Count of upcoming invoices

Sends to Slack. Replace with your preferred
notification channel (Telegram, Email, etc.).

## 5. Done

No paid or overdue invoices detected.
Workflow ends silently.

This node ensures a clean execution log
in n8n. No notification is sent.
